list.name: Hitos de campana
list.rawSql:
SELECT start_date AS time, CONCAT('Inicio campana: ', name) AS text, 'hito,campana,inicio' AS tags
FROM campaigns
WHERE start_date IS NOT NULL
UNION ALL
SELECT end_date AS time, CONCAT('Fin campana: ', name) AS text, 'hito,campana,fin' AS tags
FROM campaigns
WHERE end_date IS NOT NULL;

description: Panel ejecutivo para monitorear el riesgo humano frente a phishing, visualizar su evolución en el tiempo y priorizar acciones de intervención por campaña, territorio y canal.

panels.description: Índice general de exposición al phishing. Más alto = mayor riesgo

targets.rawSql:
WITH base AS (
  SELECT ef.event_type, ef.user_id
  FROM event_facts ef
  WHERE ef.event_type IN ('sent','open','click')
    AND $__timeFilter(ef.event_time)
    AND ('${campaign:raw}'='__all' OR ef.campaign_id::text='${campaign:raw}')
AND ('${country:raw}'='__all' OR ef.country_norm='${country:raw}')
AND ('${department:raw}'='__all' OR ef.department_norm='${department:raw}')
), rates AS (
  SELECT
    COALESCE((COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN event_type='click' THEN user_id END)::numeric / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN event_type='sent' THEN user_id END),0)) * 100,0) AS click_rate,
    COALESCE((COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN event_type='click' THEN user_id END)::numeric / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN event_type='open' THEN user_id END),0)) * 100,0) AS ctor,
    COALESCE((COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN event_type='open' THEN user_id END)::numeric / NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN event_type='sent' THEN user_id END),0)) * 100,0) AS open_rate
  FROM base
)
SELECT ROUND(LEAST(100, GREATEST(0, 0.55*click_rate + 0.35*ctor + 0.10*(100-open_rate))), 1) AS valor
FROM rates;

panels.title: Indice de riesgo humano (0-100)

panels.description: Porcentaje de personas alcanzadas que hicieron click en enlaces del correo

targets.rawSql:
WITH base AS (
  SELECT ef.event_type, ef.user_id
  FROM event_facts ef
  WHERE ef.event_type IN ('sent','click')
    AND $__timeFilter(ef.event_time)
    AND ('${campaign:raw}'='__all' OR ef.campaign_id::text='${campaign:raw}')
AND ('${country:raw}'='__all' OR ef.country_norm='${country:raw}')
AND ('${department:raw}'='__all' OR ef.department_norm='${department:raw}')
)
SELECT COALESCE(ROUND((
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN event_type='click' THEN user_id END)::numeric /
  NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN event_type='sent' THEN user_id END), 0)
) * 100, 1), 0) AS valor
FROM base;

panels.title: Tasa de click (%)

panels.description: Cambio de la tasa de click frente al período anterior. Valor negativo = mejora

targets.rawSql:
WITH bounds AS (
  SELECT $__timeFrom()::timestamptz AS from_ts, $__timeTo()::timestamptz AS to_ts
), periods AS (
  SELECT from_ts, to_ts, from_ts - (to_ts - from_ts) AS prev_from, from_ts AS prev_to
  FROM bounds
), curr AS (
  SELECT
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN ef.event_type='click' THEN ef.user_id END)::numeric AS click_users,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN ef.event_type='sent' THEN ef.user_id END)::numeric AS sent_users
  FROM event_facts ef
  CROSS JOIN periods p
  WHERE ef.event_type IN ('sent','click')
    AND ef.event_time BETWEEN p.from_ts AND p.to_ts
    AND ('${campaign:raw}'='__all' OR ef.campaign_id::text='${campaign:raw}')
AND ('${country:raw}'='__all' OR ef.country_norm='${country:raw}')
AND ('${department:raw}'='__all' OR ef.department_norm='${department:raw}')
), prev AS (
  SELECT
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN ef.event_type='click' THEN ef.user_id END)::numeric AS click_users,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN ef.event_type='sent' THEN ef.user_id END)::numeric AS sent_users
  FROM event_facts ef
  CROSS JOIN periods p
  WHERE ef.event_type IN ('sent','click')
    AND ef.event_time BETWEEN p.prev_from AND p.prev_to
    AND ('${campaign:raw}'='__all' OR ef.campaign_id::text='${campaign:raw}')
AND ('${country:raw}'='__all' OR ef.country_norm='${country:raw}')
AND ('${department:raw}'='__all' OR ef.department_norm='${department:raw}')
)
SELECT ROUND(
  (COALESCE(curr.click_users / NULLIF(curr.sent_users,0),0) * 100)
  -
  (COALESCE(prev.click_users / NULLIF(prev.sent_users,0),0) * 100)
, 2) AS valor
FROM curr, prev;

panels.title: Evolución del riesgo vs Período anterior

panels.description: Cantidad de personas alcanzadas por las campañas en el período seleccionado

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS valor
FROM event_facts ef
WHERE ef.event_type='sent'
  AND $__timeFilter(ef.event_time)
  AND ('${campaign:raw}'='__all' OR ef.campaign_id::text='${campaign:raw}')
AND ('${country:raw}'='__all' OR ef.country_norm='${country:raw}')
AND ('${department:raw}'='__all' OR ef.department_norm='${department:raw}');

panels.title: Alcance total (envios)

panels.description: Usuarios únicos que abrieron al menos un correo de simulación

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ef.user_id) AS valor
FROM event_facts ef
WHERE ef.event_type='open'
  AND $__timeFilter(ef.event_time)
  AND ('${campaign:raw}'='__all' OR ef.campaign_id::text='${campaign:raw}')
AND ('${country:raw}'='__all' OR ef.country_norm='${country:raw}')
AND ('${browser:raw}'='__all' OR ef.browser_family='${browser:raw}')
AND ('${department:raw}'='__all' OR ef.department_norm='${department:raw}');

panels.title: Interaccion (aperturas unicas)

panels.description: Porcentaje de personas alcanzadas que abrieron el correo

targets.rawSql:
WITH base AS (
  SELECT ef.event_type, ef.user_id
  FROM event_facts ef
  WHERE ef.event_type IN ('sent','open')
    AND $__timeFilter(ef.event_time)
    AND ('${campaign:raw}'='__all' OR ef.campaign_id::text='${campaign:raw}')
AND ('${country:raw}'='__all' OR ef.country_norm='${country:raw}')
AND ('${department:raw}'='__all' OR ef.department_norm='${department:raw}')
)
SELECT COALESCE(ROUND((
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN event_type='open' THEN user_id END)::numeric /
  NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN event_type='sent' THEN user_id END), 0)
) * 100, 1), 0) AS valor
FROM base;

panels.title: Tasa de apertura (%)

panels.description: Total de personas que hicieron click en el período seleccionado

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ef.user_id) AS valor
FROM event_facts ef
WHERE ef.event_type='click'
  AND $__timeFilter(ef.event_time)
  AND ('${campaign:raw}'='__all' OR ef.campaign_id::text='${campaign:raw}')
AND ('${country:raw}'='__all' OR ef.country_norm='${country:raw}')
AND ('${browser:raw}'='__all' OR ef.browser_family='${browser:raw}')
AND ('${department:raw}'='__all' OR ef.department_norm='${department:raw}');

panels.title: Usuarios expuestos

panels.description: Personas que prestaron su consentimiento para participar en simulaciones y mediciones

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS valor FROM participants WHERE consent = true;

panels.title: Participantes

panels.description: Cantidad de campañas en ejecución actualmente

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS valor FROM campaigns WHERE is_active = true;

panels.title: Campañas activas

panels.description: Tendencia diaria para ver si el riesgo sube, baja o se mantiene

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  date_trunc('day', ef.event_time) AS time,
  CASE
    WHEN ef.event_type='sent' THEN 'Enviados'
    WHEN ef.event_type='open' THEN 'Aperturas'
    WHEN ef.event_type='click' THEN 'Clicks'
  END AS metric,
  COUNT(*) AS value
FROM event_facts ef
WHERE ef.event_type IN ('sent','open','click')
  AND $__timeFilter(ef.event_time)
  AND ('${campaign:raw}'='__all' OR ef.campaign_id::text='${campaign:raw}')
AND ('${country:raw}'='__all' OR ef.country_norm='${country:raw}')
AND ('${browser:raw}'='__all' OR ef.browser_family='${browser:raw}')
AND ('${department:raw}'='__all' OR ef.department_norm='${department:raw}')
GROUP BY 1,2
ORDER BY 1;

panels.title: Evolución diaria de envíos, aperturas y clicks

panels.description: Ranking de campañas con más exposición y su variación semanal

targets.rawSql:
WITH weekly AS (
  SELECT
    date_trunc('week', ef.event_time) AS week,
    ef.campaign_id,
    MAX(ef.campaign_name) AS campaign_name,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN ef.event_type='click' THEN ef.user_id END)::numeric AS click_users,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN ef.event_type='sent' THEN ef.user_id END)::numeric AS sent_users
  FROM event_facts ef
  WHERE ef.event_type IN ('sent','click')
    AND ef.event_time >= NOW() - INTERVAL '90 days'
    AND ('${campaign:raw}'='__all' OR ef.campaign_id::text='${campaign:raw}')
    AND ('${country:raw}'='__all' OR ef.country_norm='${country:raw}')
    AND ('${department:raw}'='__all' OR ef.department_norm='${department:raw}')
  GROUP BY 1,2
), rates AS (
  SELECT
    week,
    campaign_id,
    COALESCE(campaign_name, campaign_id) AS campaign_name,
    ROUND(COALESCE((click_users / NULLIF(sent_users,0)) * 100, 0), 2) AS click_rate,
    LAG(ROUND(COALESCE((click_users / NULLIF(sent_users,0)) * 100, 0), 2)) OVER (PARTITION BY campaign_id ORDER BY week) AS prev_click_rate,
    click_users
  FROM weekly
), last_week AS (SELECT MAX(week) AS w FROM rates)
SELECT
  r.campaign_name AS "Campaña",
  r.click_users AS "Usuarios expuestos (semana)",
  r.click_rate AS "Click Rate semana (%)",
  ROUND(r.click_rate - COALESCE(r.prev_click_rate, 0), 2) AS "Variacion semanal (pp)"
FROM rates r
CROSS JOIN last_week lw
WHERE r.week = lw.w
ORDER BY 3 DESC
LIMIT 10;

panels.title: Campañas con mayor riesgo (semanal)

panels.description: Vista operativa para identificar dónde actuar primero

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  COALESCE(ef.campaign_name, ef.campaign_id) AS campana,
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN ef.event_type='sent' THEN ef.user_id END) AS usuarios_alcanzados,
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN ef.event_type='click' THEN ef.user_id END) AS usuarios_expuestos,
  ROUND(COALESCE((
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN ef.event_type='click' THEN ef.user_id END)::numeric /
    NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN ef.event_type='sent' THEN ef.user_id END),0)
  ) * 100,0), 2) AS tasa_click_pct
FROM event_facts ef
WHERE ef.event_type IN ('sent','click')
  AND $__timeFilter(ef.event_time)
  AND ('${campaign:raw}'='__all' OR ef.campaign_id::text='${campaign:raw}')
AND ('${country:raw}'='__all' OR ef.country_norm='${country:raw}')
AND ('${department:raw}'='__all' OR ef.department_norm='${department:raw}')
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 4 DESC, 3 DESC
LIMIT 15;

panels.title: Prioridad de intervención por campañas

panels.description: Mapa de zonas con mayor concentración de personas expuestas

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  g.department,
  g.lat::double precision AS latitude,
  g.lon::double precision AS longitude,
  COALESCE(d.exposed_users, 0)::double precision AS valor
FROM mendoza_departments_geo g
LEFT JOIN (
  SELECT
    ef.department_norm AS department,
    COUNT(DISTINCT ef.user_id) AS exposed_users
  FROM event_facts ef
  WHERE ef.event_type='click'
    AND ef.province_norm ILIKE 'Mendoza'
    AND $__timeFilter(ef.event_time)
    AND ('${campaign:raw}'='__all' OR ef.campaign_id::text='${campaign:raw}')
AND ('${country:raw}'='__all' OR ef.country_norm='${country:raw}')
AND ('${browser:raw}'='__all' OR ef.browser_family='${browser:raw}')
AND ('${department:raw}'='__all' OR ef.department_norm='${department:raw}')
  GROUP BY 1
) d ON LOWER(g.department) = LOWER(d.department)
ORDER BY valor DESC;

panels.title: Mapa de exposición territorial

panels.description: Distribución de personas expuestas por país

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  ef.country_norm AS country,
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN ef.event_type='click' THEN ef.user_id END) AS exposed_users
FROM event_facts ef
WHERE ef.event_type = 'click'
  AND $__timeFilter(ef.event_time)
  AND ('${campaign:raw}'='__all' OR ef.campaign_id::text='${campaign:raw}')
  AND ('${browser:raw}'='__all' OR ef.browser_family='${browser:raw}')
  AND ('${department:raw}'='__all' OR ef.department_norm='${department:raw}')
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 2 DESC;

panels.title: Exposición por país

panels.description: Distribución de personas expuestas por departamento (Mendoza)

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  ef.department_norm AS department,
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN ef.event_type='click' THEN ef.user_id END) AS exposed_users
FROM event_facts ef
WHERE ef.event_type='click'
  AND $__timeFilter(ef.event_time)
  AND ef.province_norm ILIKE 'Mendoza'
  AND ('${campaign:raw}'='__all' OR ef.campaign_id::text='${campaign:raw}')
  AND ('${country:raw}'='__all' OR ef.country_norm='${country:raw}')
  AND ('${browser:raw}'='__all' OR ef.browser_family='${browser:raw}')
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 2 DESC;

panels.title: Exposición por departamento (Mendoza)

panels.description: Navegadores/dispositivos con mayor nivel de exposición

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  ef.browser_family AS navegador,
  COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN ef.event_type='click' THEN ef.user_id END) AS usuarios_expuestos,
  COUNT(*) AS eventos_totales
FROM event_facts ef
WHERE $__timeFilter(ef.event_time)
  AND ('${campaign:raw}'='__all' OR ef.campaign_id::text='${campaign:raw}')
  AND ('${country:raw}'='__all' OR ef.country_norm='${country:raw}')
  AND ('${department:raw}'='__all' OR ef.department_norm='${department:raw}')
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 2 DESC
LIMIT 8;

panels.title: Navegadores mas expuestos

panels.description: Indicadores de completitud y consistencia de los datos medidos

targets.rawSql:
WITH scope AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM event_facts ef
  WHERE $__timeFilter(ef.event_time)
    AND ('${campaign:raw}'='__all' OR ef.campaign_id::text='${campaign:raw}')
AND ('${country:raw}'='__all' OR ef.country_norm='${country:raw}')
AND ('${browser:raw}'='__all' OR ef.browser_family='${browser:raw}')
AND ('${department:raw}'='__all' OR ef.department_norm='${department:raw}')
), totals AS (SELECT COUNT(*)::numeric AS total FROM scope)
SELECT
  'country N/A (%)' AS indicador,
  ROUND(COALESCE((COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE country_norm='N/A')::numeric / NULLIF((SELECT total FROM totals),0)) * 100,0), 2) AS valor
FROM scope
UNION ALL
SELECT
  'browser N/A (%)' AS indicador,
  ROUND(COALESCE((COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE browser_family='Otro / N/A')::numeric / NULLIF((SELECT total FROM totals),0)) * 100,0), 2) AS valor
FROM scope
UNION ALL
SELECT
  'eventos fuera de ventana campa?a (%)' AS indicador,
  ROUND(COALESCE((COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE out_of_campaign_window = true)::numeric / NULLIF((SELECT total FROM totals),0)) * 100,0), 2) AS valor
FROM scope;
